name: Cyber Agent
short_description: Welcome to the world of Cyber Agent! This is an easy to play, hotly fought 3D tower defense game, please use your mouse to aim at the enemy, auto shoot and make sure not to get hurt by the enemy! And pretty ladies to fight with you!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Cyber Agent! This is an easy to play, hotly fought 3D tower defense game, please use your mouse to aim at the enemy, auto shoot and make sure not to get hurt by the enemy! And pretty ladies to fight with you!

Game Features.
-8 levels.
-7 kinds of enemies.
-2 roles.
-5 items.
-3 skills.

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Ukrainian, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
